title: triticum curvifolium
intro: Triticum curvifolium, also known as Curved Leaf Wheat, is a rare and lesser-known species of grass within the wheat family (Poaceae). It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The plant is rich in fiber, which can help regulate bowel movements and prevent constipation, making it an effective natural remedy for digestive issues. Triticum curvifolium is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its health benefits, which include promoting a balanced gut microbiome and supporting overall well-being.
